steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase Such analysis, in turn explicitly signals that the sentence is explaining a consequence of the biased analysis Clark mentioned.

steps.title: Match the function
steps.content: The sentence explains what biased analysis produces: exaggerated reports. Choice D identifies this as elaboration on a consequence—exactly what the in turn signal indicates. The other three describe different functions. That matches choice D — D is correct.
